ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "cycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the election cycle (e.g., 2020 Presidential Election) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the candidate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party affiliated with the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of county (e.g., metropolitan, rural) */,
  "voting_system" TEXT /* Voting system used in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the candidate in the county */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the candidate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, election official, candidate) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_votes" (
  "other_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other vote */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for other candidates in the county */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for other candidates in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_votes_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "total_votes_statewide" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the candidate statewide */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout for the election */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the party (e.g., Democratic, Republican) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting trend */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the voting trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county election official */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (election official) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_election_officials_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_election_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_cycle_candidates" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate registered for the election cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id", "candidate_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each election cycle
Name of the election cycle (e.g., 2020 Presidential Election)
Start date of the election cycle
End date of the election cycle
ID of the party affiliated with the candidate
Voting system used in the county

Total number of votes for the candidate in the county

Date of the user's last login

Percentage of votes for other candidates in the county
Total number of votes for other candidates in the county
Unique identifier for each election result

Whether the candidate won the election
Affiliation of the party (e.g., Democratic, Republican)
